title: Live updates: Israel and Iran escalate attacks in Middle East; U.S. to charter evacuation flights
summary_full: Israel launched fresh strikes against Tehran and Beirut on Wednesday, as Iran targeted Persian Gulf states. The State Department is working to evacuate U.S. citizens from the region.
summary_public: Israel launched fresh strikes against Tehran and Beirut on Wednesday, as Iran targeted Persian Gulf states. The State Department is working to evacuate U.S. citizens from the region.
